meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup (Beginner Checklist)
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to break through your coding plateau. A high-impact, beginner-friendly checklist to elevate your portfolio and build real-world AI apps.
content.answer_block: To break through the tutorial plateau, integrate Claude Code into your development workflow. By leveraging AI-assisted CLI tools, you automate boilerplate, debug complex logic in real-time, and ship functional, production-ready features faster. This setup transforms your environment from a simple text editor into a powerful, AI-driven engineering workstation.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks following tutorials, yet every time you open an empty IDE, the cursor blinks back at you, mocking your lack of progress. You are stuck in the 'tutorial purgatory'—where you understand the syntax but lack the architectural confidence to build something that actually works in the real world.

But the game has changed. By mastering Claude Code, you are not just writing lines of code; you are orchestrating an autonomous coding agent to bridge the gap between your ideas and a deployed application. This isn't about shortcuts; it's about shifting your role from a typist to an AI architect.

steps.title: Configure your CLI Environment
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by installing and authenticating Claude Code within your terminal to enable deep project context awareness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and recommend a standardized directory layout for a scalable Node.js/TypeScript AI application.

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate setup. Use AI to generate production-ready project skeletons that follow industry best practices.
steps.antigremely_prompt: Generate a robust project scaffold for a SaaS app using Next.js, including folder structure, environment variable templates, and essential middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate the project file structure for a full-stack SaaS app'

steps.title: Context-Aware Debugging
steps.description: Stop guessing why your code breaks. Feed your specific errors directly into the Claude agent for instant, context-aware resolution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this stack trace and suggest a fix that aligns with my existing project architecture without introducing memory leaks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Debug the error in src/auth.ts and explain the root cause'

steps.title: Feature Prototyping
steps.description: Rapidly build out MVP features by describing the desired functionality in plain English and letting the AI draft the implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, modular function for user authentication using Supabase, ensuring type safety and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement a user login feature using the existing Supabase client'

steps.title: Codebase Refactoring
steps.description: Learn to optimize your code. Ask the AI to identify technical debt and suggest cleaner, more efficient patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit my current codebase for performance bottlenecks and propose a refactor to improve readability and maintainability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Review the current codebase and suggest 3 refactoring improvements'

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'README.md' or project spec file first so it understands your high-level goals.
Use Claude Code's 'review' command before every commit to catch hidden logic bugs.
Keep your prompt windows small and specific—AI performs better when tasked with one feature at a time.
Treat the AI as a junior developer: review its output for security vulnerabilities before deploying.
Use CLI aliases for your most frequent Claude commands to speed up your development velocity.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully implemented your first feature using Claude Code, challenge yourself to build a complete end-to-end CRUD application and deploy it to Vercel or Railway.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student just watching videos; you are an engineer actively building the future. Your portfolio is waiting for these projects to make it stand out to top-tier recruiters. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
